data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by reducing the number of choices presented at once.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation and restricted menu options.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Designs cater to ease of mouse targeting by positioning key elements strategically.
data.technical_spec: Placement of buttons and interactive objects in easily reachable areas.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing designs are employed to enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Modern design paradigms with a tidy interface layout.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users are more familiar and comfortable with design paradigms from frequently used sites.
data.technical_spec: Standardization of design patterns in line with popular web services.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Ensuring that information is presented in chunks for better comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Text and information are structured into manageable sections.
